---
title: RevealJS Support
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
toastui:
  reveal-demo:
    defaultView: month
    height: 520px
    isReadOnly: true
    file: data/events.tsv
    file-sep: "\t"
    calendars:
      - id: cal1
        name: Personal
        backgroundColor: "#03bd9e"
      - id: cal2
        name: Work
        backgroundColor: "#00a9ff"
---

## RevealJS support

The shortcode now renders in revealjs output as well as standard html output.
Other formats remain ignored.

## Notes

- The calendar is interactive inside slides.
- Keep slide calendars relatively compact so they fit within slide bounds.
- If you need multiple calendars in one deck, prefer one per slide.

## Example slide

This example uses YAML metadata plus file-based events.

```markdown
{{< toastui reveal-demo >}}
```

{{< toastui reveal-demo >}}

## Inline example

```markdown
{{< toastui file="data/events.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="week" height="420px" >}}
```

{{< toastui file="data/events.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="week" height="420px" >}}
